ssml_content: <speak><prosody rate="fast">There is no rage quite like being trapped behind a group of people walking shoulder-to-shoulder at the speed of a dying <emphasis level="strong">snail</emphasis>.</prosody> The sidewalk is not a red carpet, it is a transit corridor. You try to pass, but they drift left. You pivot right, they drift right, executing a flawless, unconscious blockade. <break time="1s"/> It is a masterclass in spatial unawareness. You are suddenly forced to re-evaluate your entire life's pace while staring at the back of their heads. <break time="2s"/> <prosody rate="slow">Have you ever had to physically step into traffic just to pass a slow walker? Vent your sidewalk rage in the comments.</prosody></speak>
